subcodes.first_line: Verily the Book proclaimeth before the faces of the world: He Who was hidden, Who was concealed from all eyes, hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الکتاب ینادی امام وجوه العالم قد ظهر المکنون الذی کان مستورا عن العیون و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies, @consolation and comfort, @Word of God and human limitations, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @service to others; to the Cause of God
